chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. D 8124 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 25814/2019 2. For hearing of main case. 21-01-2025. Mr. Arshad Shahzad Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Imtiaz Ali Solangi, Advocate for Respondent No.3 Per learned counsel for the Petitioner the entire controversy is that the Petitioner was wrongly treated as an unregistered person when in fact the Petitioner is duly registered. Learned counsel for the Respondent No.3/Department submits that comments have already been filed and admittedly the Petitioner is a registered person and active tax payer. Since the controversy with regard to the status of the Petitioner has been resolved by the Respondent No.3, therefore, the Petitioner remains at liberty to provide the Respondent No.2 with a copy hereof in order that the grievance to be resolved. The respective learned counsel jointly state that in view of the aforesaid the petition may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
